Sends a discovery signal that locks the scanner onto a nearby deposit of selected type.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_resonance.name: §dFaint Resonance
create_rns.catalyst.faint_resonance.desc: Achieved by attaching 2 or more resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.resonance.name: §dResonance
create_rns.catalyst.resonance.descriptio: Achieved by attaching 4 or more resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_shattering_res: Achieved by attaching 2 or more shattering resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.shattering_resonance: Achieved by attaching 4 or more shattering resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_stabilizing_re: Achieved by attaching 2 or more stabilizing resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.stabilizing_resonanc: Achieved by attaching 4 or more stabilizing resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.overclock.name: §6Overclocked
create_rns.catalyst.overclock.descriptio: Achieved by attaching a fluid container to a miner and filling it with lava. Lava will be consumed while the miner is working.
create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.not_on: Contraption must contain exactly _one_ drill head.
create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.wrong_: Drill head must be facing forward.
create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.drill_: Drill head is not aligned with the bearing.
create_rns.jei.item_in_group: One of %1$s items in a group
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_1: Miners can extract materials from deposits scattered around the world
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_2: Miner Mk.1 can claim deposit blocks in a 3x3x1 area below it
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_3: Its throughput and yield types depend on which deposit blocks it claimed
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_4: A deposit block cannot be claimed by more than one miner at a time
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_5: Miner Mk.1 can only mine basic deposits
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_6: Miner Mk.2 can mine all types of deposits in a 3x3x5 area
